New Sales Tax Rule

Follow the steps to create a new sales tax rule.

1

Details

Agency, rate, and application.

2

Properties

Apply to properties.

3

Review

Confirm and save.

%

Apply to Properties

Select the properties this rule should apply to. If none are selected, the rule will apply to all properties.
